noi_mo_tao_2009: Mo Tao (莫涛) was a gold medalist at the 2009 NOI (中国全国信息学奥林匹克竞赛, China National Olympiad in Informatics, the 26th edition), representing 湖南省长沙长郡中学. NOI gold medalists are the top ~20 high-school competitive programmers in China each year, with most going on to elite Chinese universities (Tsinghua University Yao Class, Peking University, Fudan University) for undergraduate computer science, often continuing to careers in technology research, AI, software engineering, or competitive programming infrastructure.
